narrative:
Sharonville 1-B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 905 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.6 percentage points.
